sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, salary BIGINT);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, salary) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 60000), (2, 'Bob', 70000);
UPDATE employees SET salary = salary + 5000 WHERE name = 'Alice';
CREATE TABLE departments (dept_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, dept_name VARCHAR);
UPDATE employees SET name = (SELECT dept_name FROM departments WHERE dept_id = 1) WHERE id = 1;
